plan.failureSummary: The chatbot failed to respond after multiple attempts and extended waiting. The agent successfully entered the test question ('What is the difference between a patent and a trademark?'), but the backend API of briefcase.chat did not stream or render any reply. The agent eventually marked the objective as not completable after confirming that the UI message limit notice was active but no response occurred.
observedIndicators: page.ai objective marked as not completable
chatbot backend unresponsive to user messages
persistent failure pattern across multiple historical runs

remediationSteps.summary: Fix briefcase.chat chatbot backend API responsiveness.
remediationSteps.details: Investigate the backend system of briefcase.chat to diagnose why it fails to answer messages. Check integration with the underlying LLM provider (e.g., OpenAI API connection or credentials).

plan.notes: The test has failed consistently over 15 historical runs (100% failure rate recently), indicating a persistent, long-standing application or backend integration issue with the chatbot API on briefcase.chat.
